matrix.ac_text: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.

removed_test_cases.title: UI allows order submission with order date set to today (minimum boundary date)
removed_test_cases.reason: Priority cap — lower-priority variant within this AC; higher-coverage tests were retained

removed_test_cases.title: API rejects POST request with empty line_items array
removed_test_cases.reason: Priority cap — lower-priority variant within this AC; higher-coverage tests were retained

removed_test_cases.title: ETL job handles source order with maximum 200 line items without data loss
removed_test_cases.reason: Priority cap — lower-priority variant within this AC; higher-coverage tests were retained

removed_test_cases.title: Database constraint rejects direct INSERT of order row with NULL order_date
removed_test_cases.reason: Priority cap — lower-priority variant within this AC; higher-coverage tests were retained

matrix.ac_text: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
Only valid state transitions are allowed.
Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.

readable.title: ETL job correctly extracts and loads order with all required fields into data warehouse

readable.title: Unauthenticated API request to create order with invalid product code returns HTTP 401 before validation

readable.title: UI rejects order containing mix of one valid and one empty-string product code

readable.title: API rejects order when product code contains SQL injection characters <'; DROP TABLE-->

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.

readable.title: API order creation for taxable product returns calculated tax in response payload

readable.title: API order with multiple taxable products at different tax rates returns correct per-line and total tax

readable.title: Database order_tax_details table stores correct tax breakdown after taxable order creation

readable.title: ETL pipeline correctly extracts and transforms tax data for taxable orders into the analytics warehouse
